'''Fru Kalg''' was a [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] who served as an operative in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Kalg was captured while on the [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]] of [[Dac/Legends|Dac]] sometime between [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] and [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]]. [[Talas Piran]] of the [[Mytaranor Slaving Council]] was suspected of being the person responsible for Kalg's disappearance.<ref name="AIR" />
